data.revised_prompt: photorealistic cinematic Japanese drama film still, professional 30-minute book-summary video visual, warm natural movie lighting, detailed lived-in interior, emotional quiet realism, Kamakura letter shop mood, red camellia motif, paper letters and fountain pen, 16:9, no readable text. Do not show crowds. Scene 16/24, Unwritten request. Specific shot: single protagonist alone in tea shop booth looking at a blank page and an untouched second teacup, gentle sea light. Connect to subtitle theme without drawing readable words: 变成某一天忽然想起时胸口的温热读这本书也是在读鸠子对女性身份的重新整理她不是只作为母亲而存在也不是只作为代笔人而存在她会爱孩子也会厌倦家务她会珍惜家庭也会怀念独处她能替别人写出细腻的信却也会在自己的生活里语塞她温柔却并不总是从容这样的不完美让她可信很多时候我们也像鸠子一样在别人眼
